title: AGENTS.md — dev.kit Smart Helper Defaults
intro: This file defines the global baseline for dev.kit AI agents.
Logic is managed by the dev.kit CLI and sourced from canonical documentation in ~/.udx/dev.kit/source/docs/.

sections.title: Mission: Resolve the Drift
bullets: Primary goal: Identify and resolve the gap between user intent and repository reality.
MANDATORY: Use `dev-kit-diagram-generator` for ALL diagram tasks.
MANDATORY: Use `dev-kit-git-sync` for all commits and synchronization.

sections.title: Execution: Task Normalization
bullets: Follow the Drift -> Normalize -> Iterate flow for all complex work.
Normalization: Transform chaotic prompts into deterministic `workflow.md` artifacts.
Contract: All workflows must follow DOC-003 (`docs/cli/execution/workflow-io-schema.md`).

sections.title: Efficiency & Safety
bullets: Route all work through dev.kit CLI primitives to ensure deterministic, bounded results.
Fail-Open: If a specialized tool fails, fallback to standard markdown/text output.
Ask for confirmation before any destructive operation (rm, reset, overwrite).

sections.title: Persistence: Experience Capture
bullets: MANDATORY: Use `dev-kit-experience-capture` at the end of every task.
Package successful resolutions back into repository 'Skills', 'Knowledge', or 'Memory'.
Maintain repo-scoped memory in the `## Context` section.
